title: Remove debug features from production
description: Deploying applications with debug features enabled in production environments creates security risks by exposing internal application details, error messages, and potentially sensitive information that attackers can exploit.
recommendation: Disable all debug features, verbose logging, and development tools before deploying to production.

noncompliant.description: Debug features and verbose logging expose sensitive information in production.

compliant.description: Use environment variables to control debug features and avoid exposing sensitive information in production.

checks.message: Debug features detected: Remove debug code, verbose logging, and debug endpoints from production
